apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {CURSOR}
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app:
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name:
          image:

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {CURSOR}
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort:
  type: ClusterIP

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {CURSOR}
  namespace: default
data:
